overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City during golden hour. The character travels along a sidewalk past the NC PRISON facility, through increasing pedestrian traffic and past futuristic billboards and elevated highways, capturing the dense cyberpunk urban atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the prison wall sidewalk with minimal pedestrian interaction

entered.detail: large industrial prison building with illuminated NC PRISON signage
multi-level highway overpass with support columns
tall concrete utility pole with traffic signals attached
green sedan parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk next to the NC PRISON building in Night City during golden hour. The area is relatively quiet with sparse pedestrian activity and occasional vehicles passing on the multi-lane road to the right. Elevated highway structures loom in the distance against the clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional urban street with commercial elements

events.description: dark van passes by on the road to the left of the character
character passes a group of pedestrians standing on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through increasing pedestrian traffic while maintaining pace

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt with number 22 walking in the same direction

entered.detail: small red food vendor stall with illuminated signage
tall industrial tower with 06 marking visible

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a busier section of the street with moderate pedestrian density. A dark van passes by on the road, and the character walks past a pedestrian wearing a white shirt with '22' on the back. A red food kiosk and large digital billboards become visible ahead, while the prison building recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial sidewalk with food vendors

events.description: blue truck passes by on the road to the right

agents.ego_description: navigating through denser crowds near commercial stalls and vendors

series of modern street light poles with horizontal lamps

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense pedestrian area with a prominent red food kiosk on the left. Various pedestrians in cyberpunk attire walk in different directions, and a blue truck passes on the road. Large digital billboards display advertisements on the right, and the industrial tower with '06' marking becomes more prominent.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an intersection with a crosswalk visible ahead. The prison building and food kiosk exit the frame as the character moves into a more open commercial area. Pedestrians are seen crossing in various directions, and modern commercial buildings line the street. The elevated highway structures remain visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet industrial perimeter that gradually transforms into a bustling, neon-lit commercial district during golden hour. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beside the NC PRISON building, moving past sparse pedestrians and multi-lane roads under the shadow of distant elevated highways. As the character advances, the prison recedes and the environment becomes more crowded, passing a dark van and a pedestrian in a white shirt before a red food kiosk and large digital billboards emerge. The scene then shifts into a dense pedestrian hub filled with cyberpunk attire and passing blue trucks, where an industrial tower marked with 06 becomes prominent against the glowing advertisements. Finally, the camera moves through a busy intersection and crosswalk, leaving the kiosk behind as the view opens up toward modern commercial buildings and the sprawling highway structures in the background.
